hero_headline: Built this 47 min after Claude told me about your Applied AI Architect Lead role.
hero_subline: I'm Álvaro. I already use Claude every day to run a 7-agent autonomous system in production. The MCP ecosystem you're shipping is the foundation I depend on — here's why I'd be useful in week 1.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: shadow a Forward Deployed eng on a real customer deployment, scope a deliverable that needs Claude + MCP + agent orchestration, ship it to that customer before Friday standup.

jd_match.requirement: Production experience with Claude and multi-agent systems
jd_match.proof: Built empresaAI — 7 specialized agents coordinated through a file-based state bus, in production 24/7 on a dedicated Mac Mini, all running on Claude API + MCP

jd_match.requirement: Customer-facing AI delivery at enterprise scale
jd_match.proof: Embedded LLMs into the recruitment workflow at Eurofirms (TOP-3 EU staffing firm, 500+ recruiters)

jd_match.requirement: Translate strategy ↔ engineering for technical buyers
jd_match.proof: Senior Consultant at Capgemini Invent delivering GenAI implementations to Fortune 500 clients + Head of Product at Olyverse (Geneva scaleup)
